{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Gate to Elysia
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] opened an enormous [[Gate to Elysia]] the length and breadth of the [[City of Light]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Shai]] can tear open a [[Gate to Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
